title: Cobblemon UI Tweaks
description: Adds small QOL improvements to Cobblemon's user interfaces
body:
This is a little client-side QOL mod that aims to make Cobblemon UI's a little nicer to use.

Current features:
- Using the summary keybind when hovering a Pokemon in a PC or pasture will open it's summary screen
- PCs and pastures will open the last viewed box when re-opened
- Scrolling in a PC or pasture will move to the next box
- Dragging top of battle message window allows it to be moved
- Dragging bottom right corner of battle message window allows it's width and height to be adjusted
  
More features are planned (and we are open to suggestions!)
